programme.title: Movie contd - Thulluvadho Ilamai
programme.desc: Six friends run away to escape from the niggling issues at home. Although they are supported by an older friend, they face many problems such as earning, facing goons and the wrath of their parents.

programme.title: Nalla Pambu
programme.desc: A CID inspector involves himself in an undercover operation to put an end to the atrocities of a smuggler, who kills people for his personal benefits.

programme.title: Rathna
programme.desc: Rathnavelu and Muthuvelu are twin brothers who get separated at birth when their parents are killed by an evil man. Rathnavelu grows up and decides to take revenge on the man who killed his parents.

programme.title: Kannukkul Nilavu
programme.desc: Gautham meets Dr Rajasekhar, a psychologist, to learn about his memories pertaining to a girl named Gayathri. Rajasekhar learns that he is looking for Shanmugam, who he thinks has killed Gayathri.

programme.title: Pistha
programme.desc: Vennila, the arrogant daughter of a wealthy businessman, gets married to Mani in order to inherit her grandfather's property. However, her life changes when she finds out that Mani is an ex-convict.

programme.title: Koodi Vazhndal Kodi Nanmai
programme.desc: Thangarasu and his wife Meenakshi take care of his brothers Krishna and Sivaraman. However, when the brothers get married, conflicts grow amongst the family members.

programme.title: Pandavar Bhoomi
programme.desc: A man returns to his ancestral village after many years only to find his house in a dilapidated state and decides to rebuild it. The engineer he brings in to do the work gets really close to his family members.

programme.title: Motta Siva Ketta Siva
programme.desc: Shivakumar IPS, a corrupt police officer, joins GK, a local politician, in his immoral activities. When GK's brother kills his best friend, he decides to turn his life around.

programme.title: Charlie Chaplin
programme.desc: When Ramakrishnan is caught with a prostitute, he introduces her to his wife as Thiru's girlfriend. Thiru, feeling helpless, goes along with the plan at the cost of upsetting his own girlfriend, Susi.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Charlie Chaplin
programme.desc: When Ramakrishnan is caught with a prostitute, he introduces her to his wife as Thiru's girlfriend. Thiru, feeling helpless, goes along with the plan at the cost of upsetting his own girlfriend, Susi.

programme.title: Vanakkam Vathiyare
programme.desc: Rajappa earns his livelihood by beating up people for a fee. But when his dying mother asks Rajappa to mend his ways, he decides to lead a peaceful life.

programme.title: Sirayile Sila Ragangal
programme.desc: Movie starring Murali, Pallavi, Prathap K Pothen and directed by Rajendrakumar.

programme.title: Onbathula Guru
programme.desc: Five friends go on an adventurous trip just before one among them is about to get married. However, post an entire night of partying, they are shocked to find one of their friends missing.

programme.title: Adutha Saattai
programme.desc: Dayalan, a dedicated college professor, works profusely in order to empower students to speak up against societal prejudices.

programme.title: Vaikundapuram
programme.desc: A jealous clerk secretly switches his newborn son with his millionaire friend's temporarily stillborn son.

programme.title: Captain Miller
programme.desc: A renegade Captain and his unconventional outlaws execute daring heists in the 1930s and 1940s. Miller must decide whether to continue running or confront the challenges head-on.

programme.title: Ellam Avan Seyal
programme.desc: Laxman Krishna, a criminal lawyer, manages to win all his cases. All the wrong-doers consider him as their God. But things change when he is assigned to defend the convicts who have murdered a girl.

programme.title: Seena Thaana 001
programme.desc: Thamizharasu, an aspiring cop, learns about a terrorist attack against the governor and informs a police officer. When he finds that the officer too is involved, he sets out to foil the attack.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Seena Thaana 001
programme.desc: Thamizharasu, an aspiring cop, learns about a terrorist attack against the governor and informs a police officer. When he finds that the officer too is involved, he sets out to foil the attack.

programme.title: Vadaku Vaasal
programme.desc: Murali is an easy-going boy who falls in love with Priya from his college. Since her family is against their union, it creates problems for the lovers

programme.title: Manju Virattu
programme.desc: Pandi and Poovazhagi hate each other since childhood. Their families forcefully get them married against their wish, much to their dismay, so as to end the trouble between the families.

programme.title: Vallakottai
programme.desc: After serving prison time, a man is seeking a job while simultaneously tending to an ailing friend. He is offered money to confess to a murder he did not commit, but instead decides to look for the real killer himself.

programme.title: Vasantha Ragam
programme.desc: Vasantha Raagam - a romantic drama film, directed by S. A. Chandrasekhar. The cast of the film includes Vijayakanth, Rahman, Sudha Chandran and S. A. Chandrasekhar. S. A. Chandrasekhar's son Vijay plays a child artist in this film

programme.title: Neengal Kettavai
programme.desc: A widow is raped and murdered by Jaishankar, a tourist, and the incident is witnessed by her two sons. The brothers are separated after their mother's death but soon come together to avenge her.

programme.title: Adaavadi
programme.desc: An actress falls in love with an arrogant filmmaker and tries in vain to make him fall in love too. When he finally does, she leaves him for another man. The shattered man is unable to work any more.

programme.title: Pattathu Arasan
programme.desc: After a scornful plot leads to the tragic demise of a family member, an older man reunites with his estranged grandson to find the culprit.

programme.title: Febrauary 14
programme.desc: Shiva falls in love with Pooja, a girl raised in the US, who is in India visiting her grandparents. When she wants to return to the US, he creates a fictitious character to impress her.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Febrauary 14
programme.desc: Shiva falls in love with Pooja, a girl raised in the US, who is in India visiting her grandparents. When she wants to return to the US, he creates a fictitious character to impress her.

programme.title: Thoongatha Kannendru Ondru
programme.desc: Devi marries Ravi without telling her father and later, Ravi leaves to work in the film industry. However, things take a turn when Devi's father tries to fix her marriage with someone else.

programme.title: Kaama Rasu
programme.desc: Kamarasu takes the blame to save Srividhya's daughter to whom he is indebted. Things take a turn when Kamarasu falls in love with Vasanthi but she suddenly dies.

programme.title: Ragalai
programme.desc: Raj leads a carefree life and makes money by betting. When he desperately needs money to treat his father, he agrees to a bet of wooing Chaitra for a large sum. But then he learns a startling fact.

programme.title: Senthamizh Selvan
programme.desc: Two best friends, Vijaykumar and Mohan, end their friendship when Vijaykumar's son and Mohan's daughter elope after falling in love with each other.

programme.title: Vambu Chanda
programme.desc: A rich boy learns that his real father is someone else, alive and in a mental asylum. He puts him under the care of an Ayurveda specialist and soon discovers the culprits behind his father's plight.

programme.title: Coolie
programme.desc: Karna, a labourer, marries his boss' daughter, Vimala, while his sister marries Vimala's brother. However, problems arise when Vimala's father tries to cause a rift between Karna and his sister.

programme.title: Thaali Kaatha Kaaliamman
programme.desc: A man marries a woman and takes her to the city after the villagers are convinced of her devotion towards the goddess, but the spirit of the man's wife from his previous life enters her body.

programme.title: Moondram Pirai
programme.desc: A young woman suffers a major head injury in a car accident after which she begins behaving like a child. Trapped at a brothel, she finds hope in a lonely school teacher who decides to rescue her.

programme.desc: Rahul falls madly in love with Monisha after watching her perform at a concert. He goes to every extent to woo her, but she refuses to meet him. As time passes, he convinces her to meet him, but fate has other plans.

programme.title: Kanave Kalaiyathe
programme.desc: Just as everything was falling into place for Anand, he is distraught when the girl he loves dies in a blast. Fate plays yet another trick on him when he finds himself face to face with her lookalike.

programme.title: Thirunelveli
programme.desc: Thulasi, a highly respected man in a village, is known for his truthfulness in all circumstances. But the real testing time arrives when his good trait brings a lot of troubles to the family.

programme.desc: Kottai supplies tools to a local gangster. When the goon's son Santhosh misbehaves with his girlfriend, Kottai loses his temper and beats him up, unaware of the miscreant's identity.

programme.title: Adhe Neram Adhe Idam
programme.desc: Kartik and Janani love each other, but Kartik's father insists that he should get settled financially before moving forward. Kartik goes to Australia for a year and befriends Siva, who happens to be engaged to Janani.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Adhe Neram Adhe Idam
programme.desc: Kartik and Janani love each other, but Kartik's father insists that he should get settled financially before moving forward. Kartik goes to Australia for a year and befriends Siva, who happens to be engaged to Janani.

programme.desc: Mahesh is an educated young man whose father is an extremely orthodox person and a strong believer of the caste system. Kamakshi, his sister, bears a child from her lover and tries to hide the truth.

programme.title: Mookkanan Kayiru
programme.desc: Movie starring Karthik, Viji, Goundamani, Jaishankar, Manorama and is directed by S Subbiah.

programme.title: Veera Thalattu
programme.desc: Pandi is a villager who loves his mother beyond words. However, Pandi gets shocked when his uncle reveals that she is not his mother. What happens when Pandi's real mother returns to the village?

programme.title: Pappa
programme.desc: An archaeologist extracts a box from the sea which contains mystical powers. However, evil people are in pursuit of the box and create trouble for the former.

programme.title: Azhahi
programme.desc: A veterinarian recalls his childhood days when he fell in love with a girl who studied with him at school

programme.title: Manasellam
programme.desc: A helpless Bala finds a place to stay with a kind-hearted shopkeeper. His room-mates, in order to ruin his chances with a cute neighbour, hatch a vicious plan and get him beaten.

programme.title: Mundhanai Mudichu
programme.desc: Parimalam, a mischievous girl, falls in love with a widower who works as a teacher. She marries him by falsely accusing him of molesting her, but she has to take a drastic step to win his heart.

programme.title: Vanakkam Chennai
programme.desc: After being cheated by Narayanan, a house agent, Ajay and Anjali end up sharing the same apartment. Love blossoms between the two while they attempt to nab Narayanan and part ways.

programme.title: Movie contd - Thulluvadho Ilamai
programme.desc: Six friends run away to escape from the niggling issues at home. Although they are supported by an older friend, they face many problems such as earning, facing goons and the wrath of their parents.

programme.title: Nalla Pambu
programme.desc: A CID inspector involves himself in an undercover operation to put an end to the atrocities of a smuggler, who kills people for his personal benefits.

programme.title: Rathna
programme.desc: Rathnavelu and Muthuvelu are twin brothers who get separated at birth when their parents are killed by an evil man. Rathnavelu grows up and decides to take revenge on the man who killed his parents.

programme.title: Kannukkul Nilavu
programme.desc: Gautham meets Dr Rajasekhar, a psychologist, to learn about his memories pertaining to a girl named Gayathri. Rajasekhar learns that he is looking for Shanmugam, who he thinks has killed Gayathri.

programme.title: Pistha
programme.desc: Vennila, the arrogant daughter of a wealthy businessman, gets married to Mani in order to inherit her grandfather's property. However, her life changes when she finds out that Mani is an ex-convict.

programme.title: Koodi Vazhndal Kodi Nanmai
programme.desc: Thangarasu and his wife Meenakshi take care of his brothers Krishna and Sivaraman. However, when the brothers get married, conflicts grow amongst the family members.

programme.title: Pandavar Bhoomi
programme.desc: A man returns to his ancestral village after many years only to find his house in a dilapidated state and decides to rebuild it. The engineer he brings in to do the work gets really close to his family members.

programme.title: Motta Siva Ketta Siva
programme.desc: Shivakumar IPS, a corrupt police officer, joins GK, a local politician, in his immoral activities. When GK's brother kills his best friend, he decides to turn his life around.

programme.title: Charlie Chaplin
programme.desc: When Ramakrishnan is caught with a prostitute, he introduces her to his wife as Thiru's girlfriend. Thiru, feeling helpless, goes along with the plan at the cost of upsetting his own girlfriend, Susi.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Charlie Chaplin
programme.desc: When Ramakrishnan is caught with a prostitute, he introduces her to his wife as Thiru's girlfriend. Thiru, feeling helpless, goes along with the plan at the cost of upsetting his own girlfriend, Susi.

programme.title: Vanakkam Vathiyare
programme.desc: Rajappa earns his livelihood by beating up people for a fee. But when his dying mother asks Rajappa to mend his ways, he decides to lead a peaceful life.

programme.title: Sirayile Sila Ragangal
programme.desc: Movie starring Murali, Pallavi, Prathap K Pothen and directed by Rajendrakumar.

programme.title: Onbathula Guru
programme.desc: Five friends go on an adventurous trip just before one among them is about to get married. However, post an entire night of partying, they are shocked to find one of their friends missing.

programme.title: Adutha Saattai
programme.desc: Dayalan, a dedicated college professor, works profusely in order to empower students to speak up against societal prejudices.

programme.title: Vaikundapuram
programme.desc: A jealous clerk secretly switches his newborn son with his millionaire friend's temporarily stillborn son.

programme.title: Captain Miller
programme.desc: A renegade Captain and his unconventional outlaws execute daring heists in the 1930s and 1940s. Miller must decide whether to continue running or confront the challenges head-on.

programme.title: Ellam Avan Seyal
programme.desc: Laxman Krishna, a criminal lawyer, manages to win all his cases. All the wrong-doers consider him as their God. But things change when he is assigned to defend the convicts who have murdered a girl.

programme.title: Seena Thaana 001
programme.desc: Thamizharasu, an aspiring cop, learns about a terrorist attack against the governor and informs a police officer. When he finds that the officer too is involved, he sets out to foil the attack.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Seena Thaana 001
programme.desc: Thamizharasu, an aspiring cop, learns about a terrorist attack against the governor and informs a police officer. When he finds that the officer too is involved, he sets out to foil the attack.

programme.desc: Pandi and Poovazhagi hate each other since childhood. Their families forcefully get them married against their wish, much to their dismay, so as to end the trouble between the families.

programme.title: Vallakottai
programme.desc: After serving prison time, a man is seeking a job while simultaneously tending to an ailing friend. He is offered money to confess to a murder he did not commit, but instead decides to look for the real killer himself.

programme.title: Ranga Ranga Pandu ranga
programme.desc: A pure-hearted devotee of Lord Panduranga, Sakhu's unwavering faith & selflessness, draw her closer to the divine but also spark jealousy, leading to poverty, betrayal, & suffering. Yet, her unshaken faith proves the power of devotion, goodness & love.

programme.title: Brindavanam
programme.desc: Indu asks her boyfriend Krishna to help her friend Bhumi.Krishna pretends to be Bhumi's lover but realises that he will need to make bigger efforts to melt the hearts of a large feuding family.

programme.title: Bhamalu Satyabhamalu
programme.desc: A captivating women's show that actively engages its audience through thoughtfully curated activities, fun games, heartfelt chats, and inspiring stories. Join us for an enjoyable experience that will leave you feeling connected & uplifted.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Sivangi
programme.desc: Born into a humble and rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Sivangi takes it upon herself to leave home and fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely confront the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Eshwar
programme.desc: The film revolves around Easwar, an assassin, who is on a mission to kill the Governor of the State and her granddaughter. However, Easwar has a disturbing past that no one else is aware of.

programme.title: Sathya
programme.desc: Sathya, who shares a close bond with her sister, values love and compassion above all, while Chamundeswari is driven by wealth and ego. But when fate brings them together, how far will Sathya go to protect her values and her family?

programme.title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
programme.desc: Kaveri's life has been a whirlwind of problems, betrayal & heartbreak until she crosses paths with Arjun. But things take an unexpected turn when Arjun's mother approaches Kaveri to heal the rift with her son. What does the future hold for Kaveri?

programme.title: Sri hari Kalyanam
programme.desc: Lakshmi, the pillar of her family, marries Srihari with a promise to continue supporting her loved ones. But their marriage soon faces challenges that test their unity and happiness.

programme.title: Moodu Mullu
programme.desc: Neelaveni, a strong-willed girl, places her family's happiness above hers. On the other hand, Tarak harbors resentment towards his mother & deliberately weds Neelaveni to cause strife. Watch Neelaveni & Tarak's destiny unfold.

programme.title: Bhairavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Sri hari Kalyanam
programme.desc: Lakshmi, the pillar of her family, marries Srihari with a promise to continue supporting her loved ones. But their marriage soon faces challenges that test their unity and happiness.

programme.desc: Audience song choice over phone call.

programme.title: Love Birds
programme.desc: Mridula relocates to the UK to nurse her broken heart after her lover Arun dies. However, when she meets a man who looks exactly like him, she tries to find his true identity.

programme.title: Mee Choice
programme.desc: Audience song choice over phone call.

programme.title: Sarada Bullodu
programme.desc: An engineer who works for an oil company immediately locks horns with two corrupt individuals after getting transferred to a village. However, he soon starts uncovering his family secrets.

programme.title: Mee Choice
programme.desc: Audience song choice over phone call.

programme.title: Chirujallu
programme.desc: An orphan named Vamsi is in love with Radhika, a businessman's daughter, and they are due to get married soon. However, Vamsi suddenly goes missing and ends up in a mental asylum.

programme.title: Anasuyamma Gari Alludu
programme.desc: Rukmini, a haughty girl from a wealthy family, falls in love with Harikrishna, a mechanic. Soon after, Harikrishna learns that his lover's mother is his maternal aunt who ruined his mother's life.

programme.title: Mee Choice
programme.desc: Audience song choice over phone call.

programme.title: Nomu
programme.desc: Eshwar, an atheist, is married to Paravathy, a firm believer of a snake god. When Eshwar's manager tries creating a rift between husband and wife, he punishes the manager for his evil deeds.

programme.desc: A man, who has four brothers, falls for a woman who belongs to a gangster family. However, her family members wish against it as her child would inherit the property.

programme.title: Chattambipaaru
programme.desc: Born into a humble, rustic background burdened by familial & financial struggles, Parvathi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch as she bravely faces the odds of life with an unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Peythozhiyaathe
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Charulatha, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Swayamvarapanthal
programme.desc: Nandini, a stunning village girl, works tirelessly out of deep devotion to her family. Meanwhile, fuelled by lingering resentment, Surya despises his mother & wilfully bonds with Nandini causing strife. Watch what destiny unfolds for Nandini & Surya

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Suryavamsha
programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Appu and Pappu
programme.desc: Cast - Master Snehith, Abbas, Rekha,Rangayana Raghu & Komal.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Upadhyaksha
programme.desc: Narayana, the Gejjapura Upadhyaksha of the Chi. Thu. Sangha is constantly at odds with Shivarudre, the village head. Things get complicated when Narayana finds himself in a romantic pursuit while working off a loan repayment as Shivarudre's slave.

programme.title: Rathasapthami
programme.desc: Sapthami's selfless nature often leads her into trouble, while Sreemanth's self-serving actions strain his ties with his own family. Their contrasting worlds collide when destiny takes their paths from conflict to togetherness.

programme.title: Mangalyaa
programme.desc: For Mayuri, family always comes first. For Tarak, bitterness towards his mother fuels every step. As their paths cross, love and revenge blur - witness the fate that binds Mayuri & Tarak together.

programme.title: Anu Pallavi

programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Rathasapthami
programme.desc: Sapthami's selfless nature often leads her into trouble, while Sreemanth's self-serving actions strain his ties with his own family. Their contrasting worlds collide when destiny takes their paths from conflict to togetherness.

programme.title: Mangalyaa
programme.desc: For Mayuri, family always comes first. For Tarak, bitterness towards his mother fuels every step. As their paths cross, love and revenge blur - witness the fate that binds Mayuri & Tarak together.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Mangalyaa
programme.desc: For Mayuri, family always comes first. For Tarak, bitterness towards his mother fuels every step. As their paths cross, love and revenge blur - witness the fate that binds Mayuri & Tarak together.

programme.title: Mayor Muthanna
programme.desc: Muthanna is a simple, honest and brave man from a village. But things change when circumstances lead him towards a life in Bangalore as the mayor of the city.

programme.title: Movie -Putani Agent 123
programme.desc: Murali, an honest police officer, is falsely charged in a murder case and sentenced to death. However, things take a turn when three students race against time to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Shankar Guru
programme.desc: Rajashekhar earns the enmity of his business partners when he opposes their illegal plans. Circumstances force him to run from the police and he is separated from his wife in the process.

programme.title: Bettada Thayi
programme.desc: In a bid to gain good luck, Ramana, a wealthy businessman, sets out to kill Chamundi, a girl who possesses unparalleled powers, on the advice of a black magician.

programme.title: Gentleman
programme.desc: The film follows the story of a man suffering from a rare disorder called the Sleeping Beauty Syndrome (aka Kleine-Levin syndrome), which leads to excessive sleepiness and leaves him awake for less than five hours a day.

programme.title: Zamindaru
programme.desc: The daughter of a rich businessman falls in love with a man she presumes is a landlord. Things change when she learns his true identity.

programme.title: Ziddi
programme.desc: Sahana falls in love with her classmate, Krishna, who fights against injustice. But his actions catch Sudhir's eye, a local gangster's younger brother, who is trying to woo Sahana.

programme.title: Nai Shekar Returns
programme.desc: Naai Sekar abducts dogs in order to extract huge ransom from their owners. However, chaos ensues when he kidnaps a dog that belongs to Dass, a notorious kidnapper.

programme.title: Giri
programme.desc: Giri is a Kannada Drama Directed by Ravicharan, Starring Srinagar Kitty and Seema in lead roles.

programme.title: Sathya Harishchandra
programme.desc: Satya Harishchandra is considered a burden by his villagers who decide to throw him out. However, his friends suggest that he marry the village head's niece in order to stay in the village.

programme.title: Karulina Koogu
programme.desc: Mohan, an alcoholic, gets married to Sharada, a music teacher. Tragedy soon strikes their life when Antony sets his eyes on Sharada and tries to take undue advantage of her.

programme.title: Bhairava
programme.desc: Bhairava is an orphan who is speech-impaired and is being enslaved by Nanjegowda, a wealthy man. When a dark secret about Nanjegowda is let loose, Bhairava vows to take revenge against him.

programme.title: Dil pasand
programme.desc: A young software engineer betrothed to a conservative woman finds his life descending into chaos after meeting an intoxicated and boisterous girl.

programme.title: Kempegowda
programme.desc: Kempe Gowda, an honest police officer and a people's man, takes on a gangster, Armugam. However, the mafia leader has close connections with the bureaucrats, which keeps him safe against the law.

programme.title: Bad Manners
programme.desc: Police officer Rudra misplaces his service weapon and goes undercover to acquire a pistol from an illicit firearms operation in Ghoda. But his high-stakes mission against the sinister network takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Olave Mandarai
programme.desc: Srikanth and Preethi fall in love at a national dance competition. However, their love undergoes several trials and tribulations.

programme.title: Movie -Shiva Leele
programme.desc: Movie starring Kalyankumar, Sithara, Sanjay and directed by V Swaminathan.

programme.title: Movie -Siddhartha
programme.desc: Siddhartha persuades Khushi's father to let them marry each other and receives his consent, but things change when he embarks on a trip with his friends before his wedding.

programme.title: Modada Mareyalli
programme.desc: The story revolves around Ravi(Shivrajkumar), the son of Ramanna (K.S.Ashwath), a Police Constable who wishes to make his son an Inspector one day. Ravi, a recent college graduate, has many opportunities to enter different fields but he goes with his father's dream of becoming an Inspector

programme.title: Chinna
programme.desc: A police officer faces many difficulties when he learns that his ancestral property is occupied by gangsters and he attempts to get it back.

programme.title: Aatma Bandhana
programme.desc: After Vaishnavi is mercilessly killed by her in-laws, her spirit enters a doll which seeks revenge against everyone responsible for Vaishnavi's death.

programme.title: Amara Madhura Prema
programme.desc: Movie starring Suresh Heblikar, Shobha, Prema Karanth and Ramesh Bhatt.

programme.title: Sri Chamundeshwari Pooja Mahime
programme.desc: Goddess Chamundeshwari strives hard to fight against several obstacles affecting her devotees and attempts to triumph over evil.

programme.title: Raaj
programme.desc: Muththuraj lives with his parents in a village but wants to be an actor. He goes to the city and bags the role of a junior artist. An associate director spots him and casts him as the main lead.

programme.title: Rama Shama Bhama
programme.desc: Rama, a married man, has an affair with Priya who pursues him despite knowing about his wife. When his friend Shama learns of the affair, the latter decides to reunite him with his wife.

programme.title: Devara Maga
programme.desc: On learning that he is an orphan, Bharath leaves his home heartbroken. Though he is brought back home by his foster father, Rajegowda, some people in the family resent it.

programme.title: Kalasipalya
programme.desc: Kencha, who is unable to pass his matriculation exam even after repeated attempts, decides to start a business. While his family supports him, the thugs in his locality oppose him at every turn.

programme.title: Naanalla
programme.desc: When his fiancee commits suicide, an innocent village boy travels to the city to exact revenge from the individual who pushed her to take her life.

programme.title: Padhe Padhe
programme.desc: Sunny, an aspiring singer, becomes an alcoholic after Kanchana leaves him. He becomes attracted to Spoorthi who helps him recover, but he ends up reconnecting with Kanchana after many years.

programme.title: Chaitrada Premanjali
programme.desc: Prem falls in love with Anjali but her father disapproves of their relationship. Their problems increase manifold when her father gets her engaged to a rich womaniser.

programme.title: Murali Meets Meera
programme.desc: Meera hitches a ride with Murali, a complete stranger. However, she spells trouble for Murali at every step and once the two fall in love, he learns the truth about her.

programme.title: Addhuri
programme.desc: After an unpleasant experience, Poorna decides to leave Arjun. However, Arjun asks for a second chance and requests that she give him six days, within which he will prove that he truly loves her.

programme.title: Keralida Simha
programme.desc: Shankar, an honest policeman, falls head over heels in love with a lawyer. But an unexpected complication arises when she becomes the defence lawyer of a gangster arrested by Shankar.

programme.title: Prince
programme.desc: Vishnu falls in love with his colleague, Anjali, and they get married. However, trouble ensues when a policeman mistakes him for being a terrorist and Anjali gets killed in the process.

programme.title: Shivam
programme.desc: A boy is forced to become a Hindu priest after the sudden demise of his father. On taking charge of the temple, he discovers many discrepancies in the temple's maintenance and decides to eliminate it.

programme.title: Hosa Love Story
programme.desc: Movie starring Veeresh, Saikumar, Megha and directed by Raj Kishore.

programme.title: Bhale Bhaskar
programme.desc: Circumstantial proof leads to a guiltless man getting arrested for a bank robbery. A rowdy is sent to kill him in prison by a merciless gangster. But he escapes and sets out to nab the real culprits.

programme.title: Guri
programme.desc: Kaliprasad, an efficient and dedicated customs officer, is falsely accused of rape after he rejects mafia leader Rudrayya's invitation to participate in illegal activities with him.

programme.title: Prana Snehitha
programme.desc: Best friends, Ram and Shyam, face many obstacles when they decide to expose the corrupt activities of an evil and powerful businessman, Jagapathi.

programme.title: Vande Matharam
programme.desc: Gayathri, a police officer, is entrusted with the responsibility of eliminating terrorists. When her younger brother is lured into terrorism, she has to overcome personal loss and save the country.

programme.title: Kaddipudi
programme.desc: Anand unwillingly enters the underworld but soon decides to change his criminal ways. He gets married and also rescues a woman from a brothel, but his past life returns to haunt him.

programme.title: Master Piece
programme.desc: Yuva grows up to be a local goon against the wish of his mother. His accidental confrontation with a dangerous drug lord lands him into a web of problems.

programme.title: Sanju Weds Geetha
programme.desc: Sanju and Geetha are all set to get married. Unfortunately, on the day before their wedding, Geeta is kidnapped and Sanju goes to prison after killing the kidnapper.

programme.title: Threeshakthi
programme.desc: When an IAS officer disguises his evil intentions, Kishore, an honest policeman, tries to bring justice by fighting for the right cause.

programme.title: Mana Mechida Sose
programme.desc: Two brothers take a strong stand against getting married. However, their lives turn around when their father convinces one of them to marry a young woman.

programme.title: Abbara
programme.desc: Dreaded gangster Vairamudi faces a vengeful attack against his ghastly crime 25 years back. Can the assailant Shiva's plan of getting into three unique avatars to avenge his father's brutal murder bring the villain to justice?

programme.title: Orata
programme.desc: Madhesh, a labourer who lives with his grandmother and youngest brother and cannot stand injustice, protects his lover and her family from a corrupt politician and his hired thugs.

programme.title: Adhyaksha In America
programme.desc: Ullas is a scamster living in a small town, who'd do anything for good money. A confusion leads him to get married to a rich NRI girl, who has an alcohol problem. What will become of this marriage?

programme.title: Soorappa
programme.desc: When a woman from a neighbouring village falsely accuses the village head of harassing her, tension spreads between the two villages, which ultimately leads to a riot making the situation worse.

programme.title: Kothigalu Sir Kothigalu
programme.desc: Rammi, Nani and Moni get an opportunity to have fun outside their marriage when a businessman employs them to teach a lesson to his daughters. But the pressure of it takes a toll on them.

programme.title: Mantra Saara
programme.desc: This program features various hymns showcasing several temples and their deities.

programme.desc: A compilation of the most commercially successful songs from recent Kannada movies.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama. Rajasekhar, a rich, influential man and his son Arun, live in a palatial home together with their extended family. Nandini, an Ichchadhaari Nagam”, (shapeshifting snake) awaits to avenge Rajasekhar’s past misdeed and regain the three ‘Kalachakram’ .

programme.title: Shabaas Bhola
programme.desc: With unshakable faith in Mahakal Shiva, little Bhola becomes the fearless defender of Kailashpur against Tantric Bhimani's dark and evil plans.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Shabaas Bhola
programme.desc: With unshakable faith in Mahakal Shiva, little Bhola becomes the fearless defender of Kailashpur against Tantric Bhimani's dark and evil plans.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Julali Gaath Ga
programme.desc: Social media influencer Saavi takes a bold stance against injustice & stays true to her values, honoring her grandfather's legacy while battling the ruthless rogue Dhairya. Join Saavi on her journey of love & courage against betrayal & oppression.

programme.title: Premas Rang Yave
programme.desc: Unfortunate events force an ambitious Akshara and a school dropout Sundar to tie the knot. Can this odd couple turn their marriage into a happily ever after? Will Akshara realize her IPS dream amidst life's many hardships?

programme.title: Hukumachi Rani Hee
programme.desc: Rani, a spirited girl devoted to her family, never hesitates to fight for justice. Indrajeet, a ruthless industrialist, driven by ego, stops at nothing to get what he wants. When fate crosses their paths & sparks fly, will it lead to chaos or change?

programme.title: Sakha Majha Pandurang
programme.desc: A pure-hearted devotee of Lord Vitthal, Sakhu's unwavering faith & selflessness, draw her closer to the divine but also spark jealousy, leading to poverty, betrayal, & suffering. Yet, her unshaken faith proves the power of devotion, goodness & love.

programme.title: Inspector Manju
programme.desc: Timid Manju and an unruly Sathya are worlds apart. But destined to be together, their lives get intertwined through an inevitable marriage. As their romantic saga begins, will they build upon each other’s strength?

programme.title: Julali Gaath Ga
programme.desc: Social media influencer Saavi takes a bold stance against injustice & stays true to her values, honoring her grandfather's legacy while battling the ruthless rogue Dhairya. Join Saavi on her journey of love & courage against betrayal & oppression.

programme.title: Mee Sansar Majha Rekhite
programme.desc: Bound and burdened by duties, Anupriya breaks free from the labels of wife and mother to embrace her true identity. With her daughter as her anchor, she steps into work, reclaims her space, and rises as a woman defined by her own name.
